positive: A vibrant, mystical jungle portal silhouette, featuring a central stylized geometric archway opening into an ethereal cosmic landscape. The composition should be highly symmetrical and central. The primary elements include detailed tropical foliage, bioluminescent glowing flora, and delicate cosmic nebula patterns emanating from the portal. Use a deep indigo and emerald green color palette with pops of glowing gold and turquoise for contrast. Style should be a highly detailed, modern vector illustration mixed with neo-art deco gothic elements. Clean linework, strong contrast, and suitability for screen printing on a dark garment. Flat color areas mixed with subtle gradient glows. Minimalist background bleed.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, poor quality, out of frame, messy, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, muted colors
